title: Pet Munchies Duck Strips Dog Treats, Premium Grain Free Dog Chews with Natural Real Meat, Low in Fat and High in Protein 90g (Pack of 8)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL DUCK: This gourmet treat is made with 100% natural, human-grade, duck breast meat - delicately slow roasted to perfection in their own natural juices

HEALTHY & JUNK-FREE: Our healthy duck strips contain no artificial colours or flavours, are naturally high in protein, grain and gluten free and low in fat & salt making them the perfect treat to feed your four legged friends
PERFECT FOR TRAINING: These tender strips of duck can be given as a chew, and are easy to break up for delicious training and reward treats for walks and recall

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our duck strips are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet

SEALED WITH A DOG'S APPROVAL: Pet Munchies is a UK based company dedicated to creating premium, gourmet treats that are made with high quality, human grade meat. Our treats are delicious, nutritious and wholesome, with all the meaty flavours dogs love delicately toasted to perfection!
description: From the manufacturer Pet Munchies factories are all designed and built based on human consumption standards and are strictly managed. Pet Munchies is a UK based company and our factory has been registered with the HACCP food safety system, and holds a European Union Licence. Pet Munchies Quality Real Duck This premium gourmet treat is made with 100% natural premium, human grade, duck breast meat. These tender strips of duck can be given as a chew, and are easy to break up for training and rewards. Naturally high in protein and low in fat and salt, delicately roasted to perfection in their own natural juices. No artificial flavours or colours. Wheat, cereal and gluten free. What better way to let your dog have a treat, that is made with the finest natural ingredients. Typical Analysis: Crude Protein 45 %, Crude Oils and Fats 2%, Crude Fibre 1%, Crude Ash 6.5%, Moisture 18%.
